instructions.instruction: Structure an SOP with the standard anatomy: title, overview, prerequisites, numbered steps, verification
instructions.relevant_when: Writing or reviewing a standard operating procedure
instructions.why_given: A consistent anatomy makes SOPs scannable and executable

instructions.instruction: Name SOP files by the action-verb + specific-outcome convention
Declare prerequisites (tools, knowledge, setup) before the steps
instructions.relevant_when: An SOP depends on tools or prior setup
instructions.why_given: Readers must know what they need before starting

instructions.instruction: Make each step a single concrete action with a verifiable result
